narrative:
Tallmadge 3-C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,025 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
